raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 27,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad fuhtija Joabs Wehst-
neschus pee Dahwida/ un faZZi-
ja: Es esmu prett Rabbu faZZojs/
un to Uhdens-Pilssahtu jaw us-
nehmis.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 28,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad nu faPulzina tohe
Laudis/ kas wehl atteê/ un ap-
mettees prett to Pilssahtu/ un
usnehmm to/ ka ne/ kad es te
Pilssahtu buhtu usnehmis/ ta
Slawa par to man paleek.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 29,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad faPulzinaja Dah-
wids wiſkus Laudis/ un nogahje
us Rabbu/ un faZZoja prett to/
un usnehme to.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 30,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un wiꞥsch nehme winna
Kehnixa Krohnt no winna Gal-
was/ furta Swars bija weens
Talents no Selta/ un dahrgem
Akniizeem/ un tas tappe Dah-
widam us Galwu likts/ wiꞥsch
arri weennu kohti warren leelu Lau-
pijumu no Pilssahta tswedde.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 31,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tohs Laudis/ kas eeksch
ta bija/ iswedde wiꞥsch/ un likke
tohs appakch dselsa Sahgreem un
Asiniizeem/ un faSchkehle tohs ar
dselsa Wadscheem/ un fadeDsina-
ja tohs Steegetu Zeplòs. Ta
darrija wiꞥsch wiffeem Pilssah-
tein to Ammona Behrnu. pehz
greesahs Dahwids un wiſfi Lau-
dis attak uhs Jerusalemi.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "N pehz to bija Absalo-
man Dahwida Dehla-
weena skaista Mahfa/
Tahmara Wahrdã/ un Ammons
Dahwida Dehls eemihleja to.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 2,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un Ammons faZZahs netwe-
fels farwas Mahfas Tahmaras
deht/ un winna bija weena Jum-
prawa/ ta ka Amnona Azzie
weena gruhta Leeta bija winna
jeb ko darriht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 3,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Bet Amnonam btja weene
Drangs/ ar Wahrdũ Jonadabs/
Simejus/ Dahwida Brahta
Dehls/ un Jonadabs bija weene
fohti andrs Wihrs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 4,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tas faZZija us winnu
Kapehz tu jo Deenas jo watra
oleefa/ tu Kehnixa Dehls? ne
gribbi tu man to faZZiht : Ta-
faZZija Ammons us winnu: Ge-
mihleju Tahmaru manna Brah-
ta Absaloma Mahfu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 5,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un Jonadabs faZZija us to:
Apgullees us tawn Gultu/ un
leezees netweffels/ kad nu tawe
Tehws naht tew apraudsiht/ tad
jakki us to: Laid jelle manna
Mahfa Tahmara nahk/ un mar
ar Maisi ehDina/un darra preeks-
mannahm Azztim Barribu/ ka es
to redsu/ un no winnas Rohka-
chmu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad apgullehs Ammons
un faZZahs netweffels. Kad nu ta-
Kehnisch natze winnu aprau-
dsiht/ tad faZZija Ammons us ta-
Kehnizu: Lai jelle manna Mah-
ta ta Tahmara nahk/ un tahdas
divt Karrafchas preeksch man
nahm
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
